_comment: Registry of test suites surfaced on the gh-pages Allure landing. Each suite is rendered as a card by scripts/generate-allure-landing.js. Adding a new suite (e.g. when a future workflow starts publishing allure-results-* artifacts) is now a single-entry append here — no separate PR to edit gh-pages/index.html. Slug must match the gh-pages directory name the suite's allure-report.yml call uses (`suite_name` input).

suites.description: Full user journey tests on real Android emulators
API unit tests with Jest coverage reports
iOS app tests on simulators via XCTest
